g.text: How does this user typically organize their workspace?
A. Deep nested directories with systematic naming
B. All files flat in root, no subdirectories
D. Minimal structure, created as needed
Searches by keyword before reading; produces
deeply nested directories with descriptive names; makes
ncremental edits with backups; actively cleans up
temporary files; pure text output without visuals.
images, notes, calendars, and chats. You may
reorganize and rename files in whatever way
